scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && ( [ -x .venv/bin/uvicorn ] && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload || UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.cache/uv uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload )
scripts.test:backend: cd apps/backend && ( [ -x .venv/bin/pytest ] && .venv/bin/pytest || UV_CACHE_DIR=../../.cache/uv uv run --extra dev pytest )
